content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''''457 7''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It was able to escape from the [[Battle of the Bajic Shipyards|Second Battle of Bajic]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
